description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by a ring of pink-blossomed trees, creating a serene and private environment. The house features a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a minimalist white facade, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces. The front includes a patio area with outdoor seating and a small pool, seamlessly blending indoor and outdoor living. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical patterns, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The landscaping is carefully curated, with the trees forming a natural barrier around the property. The overall design reflects a modern architectural style with an emphasis on simplicity, transparency, and integration with nature.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large windows and a flat roof, surrounded by pink-blossomed trees and featuring a patio and pool. The design is minimalist and open, blending indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the front-left, showing the main entrance, patio, pool, and a prominent display of large windows, with pink-blossomed trees encircling the property.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main facade with expansive windows, the patio, and the pool area, framed by the surrounding trees.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a simpler, more solid wall with fewer windows and the continuation of the tree ring, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the elongated window arrangement and the flat roof, with the trees closely bordering the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, large glass door, and adjacent patio area
